status: Fixed in integration adapter drift repair
finding: `node atm.mjs doctor --json` failed on `ATM_DOCTOR_INTEGRATION_DRIFT` after framework source/template changes left installed adapter files and `.atm/integrations/*.manifest.json` out of sync. The drift was unrelated to the Team vendor execution backend but still made doctor look red after a successful guarded push.
expectedBehavior: Installed integration adapters should be refreshed through `node atm.mjs integration add <adapter> --force --json`, then `doctor` should pass or report only unrelated active worktree residue.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced 2026-07-10: doctor reported stale/drift for `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `copilot`, and `cursor`, with `gemini` installed. Repair refreshed all six installed adapters through the official integration CLI and re-ran verification.
followUp: Keep adapter parity refresh as one governed batch when several manifests share the same source snapshot drift; do not hand-edit generated adapter files.
